Translation.Description: Once penance is served and absolution is found, restitution lies at the end of the journey.
Translation.Provides: Penitent's Restitution - Heals all allies and caster gains 3 hit points permanently (Requires 40 Penitent's Suffering charges)
Penitent's Suffering - Penance is served each time the wearer is struck in combat (+1 charge)
